Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x6604 "SPYVSSPY-0400-6604" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $0400 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Spy vs Spy.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Moved some init code from $02A7 to $0400 to ensure it was above the dump start address of $0400.
